name: Clam and Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain juice from clams and save liquid.
2. Chop clams.
3. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
4. Blend flour and seasonings (salt, curry powder) into the melted butter until smooth.
5. Mix clam juice with milk to make 1 1/2 cups. Gradually add this mixture to the flour blend while stirring constantly.
6. Cook the mixture over low heat until it is thick and smooth.
7. Add chopped clams to the sauce.
8. Arrange half of the potatoes in a greased casserole dish, followed by half of the onions.
9. Cover with half of the clam sauce.
10. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
11. Sprinkle cheese and paprika on top.
12. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
